melee_attacks.notes: Supports main-path melee attacks, HP mutation, and defeat status.

missile_attacks.notes: Supports range bands, ammunition expenditure, and attack resolution through v0.4 compact rules.

initiative_segments.notes: Side/actor initiative with DEX-score tiebreaker; surprise segments and spell-casting interruption hooks implemented; exhaustive within-segment ordering remains partial.

spell_casting.notes: v0.4 spell engine: magic missile, sleep, web, cure light/serious wounds, bless, protection from evil, hold person, fireball, lightning bolt, dispel magic, cause light wounds, darkness.

spell_interruption.notes: Damage-before-completion interruption helper is implemented; exact full segment timing remains partial.

turn_undead.notes: Compact turning matrix for common undead categories is implemented.

morale_reaction.notes: 2d6 morale and 2d10 reaction helpers are implemented for encounter scripting.

dragon_fear_breath.notes: resolve_dragon_fear (save vs spell) and resolve_dragon_breath (damage = current HP, save vs breath for half) implemented per MM; breath_type field on dragon actor selects acid/fire/etc.

staff_of_mishakal.notes: Supports party possession, recharge, and finale shatter.

dl1_main_path.notes: Event 1 through Epilogue main spine is implemented.

dl1_optional_branches.notes: Several scenes have content stubs, but full open-ended branch play remains future work.

item_saving_throws.notes: Compact item saving throw helper is implemented for common material/attack forms.

xp_training.notes: xp_to_next_level and training_cost helpers implemented; PHB XP thresholds by class group; training costs 1500 gp/level per DMG.

surprise.notes: d6 surprise helper with segments-lost metadata.

saving_throws_core.notes: Class-group/level saving throw targets for death, wand, paralysis, breath, and spell categories.

encumbrance_movement.notes: Compact GP-weight movement reduction helper; detailed item weights remain data-dependent.

reaction_checks.notes: 2d10 reaction bands exposed for NPC behavior.

xp_treasure.notes: Per-share XP calculation from monster kills and treasure gp; class bonus XP remains future work.

search_hidden_facts.notes: d6 search resolver against KnowledgeFacts gated on discovery_conditions. Default 1-in-6 per round; racial bonuses for elves/half-elves (secret/concealed doors), dwarves (stonework, sliding walls), gnomes (unsafe structure) per PHB pp. 16-17. Race field on CharacterState not yet populated, so racial bonuses are dormant until pregens carry race.
